title: DustShield: Electrodynamic Dust Shield Digital Twin
rationale: Topic 1 offers the strongest visual wow factor for the hackathon (Three.js 3D viewport) and directly demonstrates engineering depth by mapping complex high-voltage phase parameters to real-time particle kinematics. It also provides a seamless integration pathway for physical hardware telemetry via Web Serial in future stages, making it an ideal digital twin implementation.
team_expertise_alignment: Aligns with strong front-end capabilities, custom CSS tokens design systems, and mathematical kinematics modeling.

included: Three.js lunar terrain and solar panel view
Dynamic particle system representing 150+ dust particles
Live sliders for Voltage and Frequency control
Solar efficiency and dust coverage metrics calculation
Web Serial telemetry integration architecture framework
excluded: Physical PCB hardware fabrication (per user constraints)
Real-time 3D PDE Maxwell's equation electrodynamic field solver
